testcase.name: example_tm_a_mmrm.Rd
testcase.system-out: values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") - Setting explicit `selected` while `choices` are delayed (set using `tidyselect`) doesn't guarantee that `selected` is a subset of `choices`. Backtrace: x 1. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) with_mocked_app_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:124:5 2. | +-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 3. | \-testthat::with_mocked_bindings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 4. +-teal.modules.clinical (local) suppress_warnings(...) at test-examples.R:106:3 5. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) at test-examples.R:20:3 6. +-testthat::expect_no_error(...) 7. | \-testthat:::expect_no_(...) 8. | \-testthat:::quasi_capture(enquo(object), NULL, capture) 9. | +-testthat (local) .capture(...) 10. | | +-base::withRestarts(...) 11. | | | \-base (local) withOneRestart(expr, restarts[[1L]]) 12. | | | \-base (local) doWithOneRestart(return(expr), restart) 13. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 14. | \-rlang::eval_bare(quo_get_expr(.quo), quo_get_env(.quo)) 15. \-pkgload::run_example(...) 16. \-base::source(tmp, echo = !quiet, local = env, max.deparse.length = Inf) 17. +-base::withVisible(eval(ei, envir)) 18. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 19. \-base::eval(ei, envir) 20. +-teal::init(...) 21. | +-checkmate::assert(...) 22. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 23. | | \-base::eval(dots[[i]], envir = env) 24. | \-checkmate::check_multi_class(modules, c("teal_modules", "teal_module")) 25. +-teal::modules(...) 26. +-teal.modules.clinical::tm_a_mmrm(...) 27. +-teal.modules.clinical:::tm_a_mmrm.default(...) 28. | \-checkmate::assert_class(paramcd_values, "values") 29. | \-checkmate::checkClass(x, classes, ordered, null.ok) 30. \-teal.picks::values(selected = "FKSI-FWB") 31. \-teal.picks:::.pick(...)

skipped.message: Reason: wip - being finished in a different PR ('test-shinytest2-tm_a_mmrm_picks.R:1:1')
Reason: Slow CI machine prevents this test from succeding ('test-shinytest2-tm_t_pp_laboratory.R:1:1')

testcase.name: template_summary_by_rtables_output_for_different_statistics_adds_fraction_to_the_statistics
testcase.system-out: `multiple` has been set to `FALSE`, while selected contains multiple values, forcing to select first:<fn> Backtrace: x 1. \-shiny::testServer(...) at test-tm_t_summary_by.R:121:5 2. +-shiny:::withMockContext(session, rlang::exec(app, !!!args)) 3. | +-shiny::isolate(...) 4. | | +-shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. | | \-ctx$run(...) 6. | | +-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. | | +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. | | | \-base::force(expr) 12. | | +-shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. | | | \-base::force(expr) 14. | | +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. | | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. | | \-env$runWith(self, func) 19. | | \-shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. | | \-shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. | +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. | | \-base::force(expr) 25. | \-withr::with_options(...) 26. | \-base::force(code) 27. +-rlang::exec(app, !!!args) 28. \-teal.modules.clinical (local) `<fn>`(...) 29. \-shiny::moduleServer(...) 30. +-session$setReturned(callModule(module, id, session = session)) 31. \-shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 32. +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 33. | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 34. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 35. | \-base::force(expr) 36. \-teal.modules.clinical (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 37. +-teal.picks::picks_srv(id = "", picks = spec_list, data = data) 38. \-teal.picks:::picks_srv.list(id = "", picks = spec_list, data = data) 39. \-base::sapply(...) 40. \-base::lapply(X = X, FUN = FUN, ...) 41. \-teal.picks (local) FUN(X[[i]], ...) 42. +-teal.picks::picks_srv(name, picks[[name]], data) 43. \-teal.picks:::picks_srv.picks(name, picks[[name]], data) 44. \-shiny::moduleServer(...) 45. \-shiny::callModule(module, id, session = session) 46. +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 47. | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 48. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 49. | \-base::force(expr) 50. \-teal.picks (local) module(childScope$input, childScope$output, childScope, ...) 51. +-shiny::reactiveVal(...) 52. | \-ReactiveVal$new(value, label) 53. | \-shiny (local) initialize(...) 54. +-teal.picks:::restoreValue(...) 55. \-teal.picks::resolver(picks, shiny::isolate(data())) 56. +-teal.picks:::determine(x[[i]], data = data_i) 57. \-teal.picks:::determine.values(x[[i]], data = data_i) 58. \-teal.picks:::.determine_selected(...)

testcase.name: template_summary_by_rtables_output_for_different_statistics_adds_fraction_to_the_statistics
testcase.system-out: `multiple` has been set to `FALSE`, while selected contains multiple values, forcing to select first:<fn> Backtrace: x 1. +-shiny::testServer(...) at test-tm_t_summary_by.R:121:5 2. | +-shiny:::withMockContext(...) 3. | | +-shiny::isolate(...) 4. | | | +-shiny::..stacktraceoff..(...) 5. | | | \-ctx$run(...) 6. | | | +-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 7. | | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 8. | | | +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 9. | | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 10. | | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 11. | | | | \-base::force(expr) 12. | | | +-shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 13. | | | | \-base::force(expr) 14. | | | +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 15. | | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 16. | | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 17. | | | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 18. | | | \-env$runWith(self, func) 19. | | | \-shiny (local) contextFunc() 20. | | | \-shiny::..stacktraceon..(expr) 21. | | +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 22. | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 23. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 24. | | | \-base::force(expr) 25. | | \-withr::with_options(...) 26. | | \-base::force(code) 27. | \-rlang::eval_tidy(quosure, mask, rlang::caller_env()) 28. +-session$setInputs(...) at test-tm_t_summary_by.R:125:9 29. | \-self$setInputs(!!!mapNames(ns, rlang::dots_list(..., .homonyms = "error"))) 30. | \-private$flush() 31. | \-shiny:::flushReact() 32. | \-.getReactiveEnvironment()$flush() 33. | \-ctx$executeFlushCallbacks() 34. | \-base::lapply(...) 35. | \-shiny (local) FUN(X[[i]], ...) 36. | \-shiny (local) flushCallback() 37. | +-shiny:::hybrid_chain(...) 38. | | \-shiny (local) do() 39. | | +-base::tryCatch(...) 40. | | | \-base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 41. | | | \-base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 42. | | | \-base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 43. | | +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 44. | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 45. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 46. | | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 47. | | +-base::withVisible(force(expr)) 48. | | \-base::force(expr) 49. | +-shiny:::shinyCallingHandlers(run()) 50. | | +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 51. | | \-shiny::captureStackTraces(expr) 52. | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 53. | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 54. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 55. | \-shiny (local) run() 56. | \-ctx$run(.func) 57. | +-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 58. | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 59. | +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 60. | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 61. | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 62. | | \-base::force(expr) 63. | +-shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 64. | | \-base::force(expr) 65. | +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 66. | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 67. | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 68. | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 69. | \-env$runWith(self, func) 70. | \-shiny (local) contextFunc() 71. | \-shiny (local) `observeEvent(all_choices())`(...) 72. | +-shiny:::hybrid_chain(...) 73. | | \-shiny (local) do() 74. | | +-base::tryCatch(...) 75. | | | \-base (local) tryCatchList(expr, classes, parentenv, handlers) 76. | | | \-base (local) tryCatchOne(expr, names, parentenv, handlers[[1L]]) 77. | | | \-base (local) doTryCatch(return(expr), name, parentenv, handler) 78. | | +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 79. | | | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 80. | | | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 81. | | | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 82. | | +-base::withVisible(force(expr)) 83. | | \-base::force(expr) 84. | \-shiny (local) eventFunc() 85. | \-rlang::eval_tidy(qs) 86. \-shiny (local) all_choices() 87. +-shiny::..stacktraceoff..(self$.updateValue()) 88. \-self$.updateValue() 89. \-ctx$run(...) 90. +-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 91. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 92. +-shiny::withReactiveDomain(...) 93. | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 94. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 95. | \-base::force(expr) 96. +-shiny:::with_otel_span_context(...) 97. | \-base::force(expr) 98. +-shiny::captureStackTraces(...) 99. | \-promises::with_promise_domain(...) 100. | \-domain$wrapSync(expr) 101. | \-base::withCallingHandlers(expr, error = doCaptureStack) 102. \-env$runWith(self, func) 103. \-shiny (local) contextFunc() 104. +-base::withCallingHandlers(...) 105. +-base::withVisible(.func()) 106. \-shiny (local) .func() 107. +-shiny::..stacktraceon..(`<reactive>`(...)) 108. \-teal.picks (local) `<reactive>`(...) 109. +-teal.picks:::determine(x = picks[[slot_name]], data = this_data()) 110. \-teal.picks:::determine.values(x = picks[[slot_name]], data = this_data()) 111. \-teal.picks:::.determine_selected(...)

testcase.name: template_summary_by_rtables_output_for_different_statistics_adds_count_to_the_statistics
